Name: UBTTask_MoveTo
Description:
Move To task node.
  Moves the AI pawn toward the specified Actor or Location blackboard entry using the navigation system.

Variables.Name: AcceptableRadius
Variables.Description: fixed distance added to threshold between AI and goal location in destination reach test

Variables.Name: FilterClass
Variables.Description: "None" will result in default filter being used

Variables.Name: ObservedBlackboardValueTolerance
Variables.Description:
if task is expected to react to changes to location represented by BB key 
	 	this property can be used to tweak sensitivity of the mechanism. Value is 
	 	recommended to be less then AcceptableRadius

Variables.Name: bObserveBlackboardValue
Variables.Description: if move goal in BB changes the move will be redirected to new location

Variables.Name: bAllowPartialPath
Variables.Description: if set, use incomplete path when goal can't be reached

Variables.Name: bTrackMovingGoal
Variables.Description: if set, path to goal actor will update itself when actor moves

Variables.Name: bProjectGoalLocation
Variables.Description: if set, goal location will be projected on navigation data (navmesh) before using

Variables.Name: bReachTestIncludesAgentRadius
Variables.Description: if set, radius of AI's capsule will be added to threshold between AI and goal location in destination reach test

Variables.Name: bReachTestIncludesGoalRadius
Variables.Description: if set, radius of goal's capsule will be added to threshold between AI and goal location in destination reach test

Variables.Name: bStopOnOverlap
Variables.Description: DEPRECATED, please use combination of bReachTestIncludesRadius instead
